findings.location: s1 — 障害解析ログの出力例
findings.description: The source includes a concrete log output example showing how masked fields appear in the actual障害解析ログ output (e.g., MAIL_ADDRESS=**, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_AREA_CODE=***, etc.), along with the log format including timestamp, log level, and Stack Trace Information section. This illustrative example is omitted from the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 「障害解析ログの出力例を下記に示す。CustomDataItemクラスに定義したマスク対象のパターンにマッチするデータはマスクされて出力される。」followed by the full log output block showing MAIL_ADDRESS=********************, MOBILE_PHONE_NUMBER_AREA_CODE=***, etc.
